generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT temperature sensor deployed across building infrastructure to collect real-time environmental data for DT synchronization via Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT occupancy sensor measuring human presence in building zones, integrated with BIM metadata for zone-specific analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT light sensor monitoring ambient light levels for adaptive lighting control policies in BOREALIS project"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT energy monitor tracking real-time energy consumption patterns across building systems for operational efficiency analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMonitor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMAssetModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched 3D BIM model representing geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics of building components with embedded device configurations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelTransformationEngine
]

instance RuntimeDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured representation of sensor readings, device states, and control logic integrated via Eclipse Ditto for real-time synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance ControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based policies for adaptive control (e.g., BOREALIS lighting optimization) and rule-based automation for BCS operations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 assets providing interactive 3D rendering of the DT for immersive monitoring and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance MetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Device configurations, tenant IDs, and endpoint addresses stored in BIM for automated deployment and runtime configuration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured temperature readings from IoT sensors mapped to corresponding BIM elements for visualization and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy patterns collected from IoT sensors integrated with BIM zone metadata for operational efficiency metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ambient light level measurements used for adaptive lighting control policies and visual comfort optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

instance EnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption data analyzed for predictive maintenance and operational efficiency recommendations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight IoT connectivity framework enabling device management and real-time data ingestion from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables SensorDataIngestionService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service-oriented middleware for bidirectional twin synchronization, data management, and runtime configuration of building control systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinSynchronizationService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-fidelity visualization platform providing interactive 3D monitoring and simulation of building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:enables ImmersiveMonitoringService
]

instance ModelTransformationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tool implementing model-to-model and model-to-text transformations for automated DT deployment from BIM"
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService
]

instance BIMEnrichmentTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tool (e.g., Revit/ArchiCAD) for initial asset modeling and semantic enrichment with runtime device configurations"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetModelingService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework enabling adaptive control policies (e.g., BOREALIS project) for dynamic building system optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService
]

// C6: Services
instance SensorDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data ingestion service processing sensor readings from Eclipse Hono for DT synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataValidationInsight, DataMappingAction
]

instance TwinSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bidirectional synchronization service maintaining consistency between physical building systems and digital twin representations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalEfficiencyInsight, ControlPolicyUpdateAction
]

instance ImmersiveMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service enabling facility managers to monitor building performance in real-time via Unreal Engine"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualAnalyticsInsight, StakeholderCollaborationAction
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service identifying potential equipment failures using sensor trend analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceAlertInsight, PreventiveAction
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic control service adjusting lighting, HVAC, and shading systems based on reinforcement learning policies"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, ComfortAdjustmentAction
]

instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven deployment service generating runtime artifacts from enriched BIM models for DT initialization"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentValidationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance SensorDataValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation metrics for sensor data quality and consistency during ingestion process"
]

instance DataMappingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated mapping of sensor data to corresponding BIM elements for visualization and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time metrics for energy consumption, occupancy patterns, and equipment performance optimization"
]

instance ControlPolicyUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Runtime updates to control policies based on sensor data and reinforcement learning feedback"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representations of building performance data for stakeholder collaboration and decision-making"
]

instance StakeholderCollaborationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Integration of visual analytics tools for architects, engineers, and facility managers to align lifecycle decisions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MaintenanceAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Early warnings for potential equipment failures based on sensor trend analysis and predictive maintenance models"
]

instance PreventiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated scheduling of maintenance activities based on predictive alerts"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for energy consumption optimization through adaptive control policies"
]

instance ComfortAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustments to lighting, HVAC, and shading systems for optimal occupant comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeploymentValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results for automated deployment artifacts generated from BIM models"
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control system actuator for automated lighting systems configured via BIM and controlled through Eclipse Ditto middleware"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning system actuator integrated with reinforcement learning policies for adaptive control"
]

instance ShadingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated shading device actuator synchronized with light sensor data for visual comfort optimization"
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building environment containing all sensors, actuators, and control systems for the digital twin"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightSensor, EnergyMonitor, LightingActuator, HVACActuator, ShadingActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual environment containing all models, services, and enablers supporting the building digital twin"
    base:contains BIMAssetModel, RuntimeDataModel, ControlModel, VisualizationModel, MetadataModel, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngineVisualization, SensorDataIngestionService, TwinSynchronizationService, ImmersiveMonitoringService, PredictiveMaintenanceService, AdaptiveControlService, ModelTransformationEngine, BIMEnrichmentTool, ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

// Added missing service instance
instance AssetModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for initial asset modeling and semantic enrichment of BIM models with runtime device configurations"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is enabled through **control logic embedded in the DT**, which generates outputs (e.g., **adjustment commands for lighting, HVAC, or shading systems**) and transmits them back to physical actuators via **Eclipse Ditto’s bidirectional communication channels**. The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, allowing facility managers to adjust control parameters (e.g., setpoints, schedules) directly through the DT interface, which then propagates these changes to the physical BCS. This interaction is critical for **closed-loop control systems**, such as those implemented in the **BOREALIS project** for adaptive lighting."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on **real-time and near-real-time scales**, with synchronization frequencies determined by the **sampling rates of IoT sensors** (e.g., **1-second intervals for environmental sensors, 5-minute intervals for energy consumption data**). The framework supports **event-driven updates** for critical alerts (e.g., occupancy changes, equipment failures) and **periodic synchronization** for less time-sensitive data. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the **temporal fidelity** of the DT’s synchronization with the physical twin, ensuring alignment between virtual and physical states."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Core**: The **semantic backbone** for asset representation and device modeling.
   - **IoT Layer**: **Eclipse Hono** for device connectivity and **Eclipse Ditto** for twin synchronization.
   - **Control Layer**: **Runtime policies** (e.g., reinforcement learning models) for adaptive management.
   - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** for immersive interaction.
   - **Extension Layer**: **Modular services** (e.g., analytics, maintenance tools) integrated via standardized APIs.
   The constellation supports **bidirectional data flows** between physical and virtual systems, enabling **closed-loop control** and **real-time decision-making**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **multiple lifecycle stages**, from **design and construction (as-designed)** to **operation and maintenance (as-operated)**. During the **design phase**, the BIM model serves as the primary asset model, enriched with **runtime semantics** (e.g., sensor configurations, control logic). In the **construction phase**, the DT supports **automated commissioning** of building systems. During **operation**, the DT enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control**, while in the **adaptation/refurbishment phase**, it facilitates **data-driven decision-making** for retrofits and upgrades. The framework also supports **post-occupancy evaluation**, where sensor data is used to refine models and policies."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the **alignment between virtual and physical states** by comparing sensor data and DT outputs.
   - **Model validation**: **Static and dynamic checks** on BIM models to ensure semantic consistency and completeness.
   - **Uncertainty quantification**: **Statistical analysis** of sensor data to assess model accuracy and drift over time (e.g., addressing **semantic drift** as discussed in Abbasi et al.).
   - **Verification and validation (V&V) protocols**: **Cross-referencing** of DT outputs with physical measurements to validate control logic and predictions.
   - **Reinforcement learning validation**: **Post-occupancy evaluation** of control policies (e.g., in BOREALIS) to refine energy-efficiency strategies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono** for **IoT device connectivity** (e.g., MQTT, CoAP protocols) and **Eclipse Ditto** for **twin synchronization** (RESTful APIs, WebSockets). The physical-to-virtual connection uses **device-specific endpoints** (e.g., tenant IDs, device IDs) configured in the BIM model. Virtual-to-physical interactions rely on **Ditto’s bidirectional communication channels**, enabling **real-time control commands** (e.g., HVAC adjustments). The framework supports **secure, low-latency connections** for critical applications (e.g., safety systems)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **cloud-native, service-oriented architecture**, with:
   - **Eclipse Ditto** hosted as a **microservice** for twin management and data processing.
   - **Eclipse Hono** deployed as a **lightweight IoT gateway** for device connectivity.
   - **Unreal Engine 5 assets** rendered on **client-side devices** (e.g., facility manager workstations) for visualization.
   - **BIM models** stored in a **centralized repository** (e.g., BIM server) for version control and collaboration.
   The deployment is **modular and scalable**, allowing components to be deployed independently (e.g., Ditto on Kubernetes, Unreal Engine on local machines)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** with:
   - **External IoT platforms**: Compatibility with **MQTT brokers, CoAP servers**, and other IoT ecosystems via Eclipse Hono.
   - **Building Management Systems (BMS)**: Interoperability with proprietary BMS (e.g., Siemens Desigo, Honeywell) through standardized APIs.
   - **Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems**: Data exchange for **cost modeling, asset tracking, and lifecycle management**.
   - **Other Digital Twins**: Potential integration with **city-scale DTs** or **infrastructure networks** via **semantic interoperability layers** (e.g., ontologies for AECO standards)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are addressed through:
   - **BIM model ownership**: Typically retained by the **building owner or design firm**, with controlled access for facility managers and DT engineers.
   - **Runtime data ownership**: **Physical asset owner** retains primary ownership, but **DT service providers** may manage processed data (e.g., analytics outputs) under **data processing agreements**.
   - **Privacy safeguards**: **Anonymization of occupancy data**, **role-based access control (RBAC)** in Ditto, and **compliance with GDPR/building-specific regulations** (e.g., LEED standards)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
   - **BIM standards**: **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** for semantic interoperability and **COBie (Construction Operations Building Information Exchange)** for asset handover.
   - **IoT standards**: **MQTT, CoAP, and OMA LWM2M** for device connectivity via Eclipse Hono.
   - **Digital Twin standards**: **Ditto’s RESTful APIs** and **Eclipse IoT standards** for twin synchronization.
   - **Control system standards**: **KNX, BACnet, or Modbus** for BCS interoperability (where applicable).
   - **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)**: **MOF (Meta-Object Facility)** and **QVT (Query/View/Transformation)** for automated deployments."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
   - **Authentication and authorization**: **Role-based access control (RBAC)** in Ditto for restricting DT interactions (e.g., facility managers vs. DT engineers).
   - **Data encryption**: **TLS/SSL** for all IoT and twin communication channels.
   - **Network segmentation**: Isolation of **critical control systems** (e.g., HVAC) from non-critical services to prevent unauthorized access.
   - **Safety protocols**: **Fail-safe mechanisms** for actuators (e.g., emergency shutdowns) and **real-time monitoring** of physical states to prevent hazards.
   - **Compliance**: Adherence to **ISO/IEC 42010 (Systems Engineering)** and **IEC 62443 (Industrial Cybersecurity)** for secure DT operations."
]
